rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Enumerating Domain Trust Relationships with Nltest.exe

rules.rule_text:
title: Enumerating Domain Trust Relationships with Nltest.exe
id: 3ddc7df5-780a-442a-8d41-269f476ed24a
status: experimental
description: "Left unchecked, SocGholish may lead to domain discovery. This type of\
  \ behavior is \noften a precursor to ransomware activity, and should be quickly\
  \ quelled to prevent \nfurther progression of the threat. Part of the RedCanary\
  \ 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/socgholish/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1482
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \nltest.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - /domain_trusts
    - /all_trusts
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
